patterns_identified.summary: Multiple starters failed to suppress runs despite strong K rate profiles, causing Under props to fail and combined K plus Under bets to both lose.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: When stacking K over and Under total on the same starter, require ERA below 3.50 in last 5 starts and minimum 5 innings pitched average in last 3 starts before publishing both as separate picks.

adjustments_for_today: When stacking K over and Under total on the same starter, require ERA below 3.50 in last 5 starts and minimum 5 innings pitched average in last 3 starts before publishing both as separate picks.
monitoring_list: Sheehan (LAD): short outing pattern, K prop downgrade warranted
Roupp (SF): K/9 vs contact teams may be overrated — monitor
Kay (CWS): outperformed wOBA split vs RHB — watch for regression
